products.name: Zebronics Zeb-SOUND BOMB 9 Wireless Earbuds
products.hook: Achha sun, agar ek solid deal chahiye under ₹500, toh ye Zebronics TWS dekh le.
products.pain: Budget tight hai, par wired earphones ki life se pak gaya hai? Ek decent sound quality aur reliable earbuds chahiye?
products.fix: Ye Zebronics Zeb-SOUND BOMB 9 ₹499 mein de rahe hain, upar se Made in India aur 30 घंटे का प्लेबैक! Gaming mode bhi hai, lectures bhi sunn lega, aur splash proof bhi hai. Hostel mein daily use ke liye best hai, na tension na zyada kharcha.
products.loot_reason: Normally ₹1699 ka bikta hai, abhi ₹499 mein mil raha hai, practical aur budget-friendly deal!

products.name: pTron Bassbuds F-M9 True Wireless Stereo Earbuds
products.hook: Abe yaar, ye pTron TWS ₹499 mein? Bhai, meri aankhein khuli ki khuli reh gayi! 😳 Stock khatam hone se pehle order kar!
products.pain: Hostel mein group study chal rahi hai aur tujhe apni podcast sunni hai? Ya midnight assignments pe kaam karte time distractions se bachna hai?
products.fix: Ye pTron Bassbuds F-M9 sirf ₹499 mein mil rahe hain, upar se digital display aur 32 घंटे का टोटल प्लेबैक! ENC Tech hai, matlab calls crystal clear. Aur kya chahiye, bhai?
products.loot_reason: Iska original price ₹3599 hai, abhi ₹499 mein legendary deal hai, aisa mauka dobara nahi aayega!

products.name: boAt Rockerz 255 Neo in-Ear Bluetooth Neckband
products.hook: Bhai, ye boAt ka neckband dekh! Price glitch hai ya kya? 😱 Fatak se utha le!
products.pain: Hostel mein sabke saamne loud music ya calls ka issue hai? Ya study karte time wired earphones tang karte hain?
products.fix: Ye boAt Rockerz 255 Neo ₹399 mein, upar se 25 घंटे की बैटरी लाइफ! Wireless freedom, mast bass aur class calls sab smooth! Lecture sunna ho ya chill karna ho, perfect hai. Wired ki jhanjhat khatam, aur kya chahiye?
products.loot_reason: Typically ₹2990 ka milta hai, abhi ₹399 mein mil raha hai – itna bada discount phir nahi milega!

products.name: APFEN USB Type- A to Lightning Cable [MFi Certified] Fast Charging & Data Sync Cable Compatible With iPhone
products.hook: iPhone users, suno! MFi Certified cable ₹265 mein? Ab aur kya chahiye!?
products.pain: Local cables se iPhone ki battery health kharab ho rahi hai? Ya baar baar 'accessory not supported' ka error aata hai?
products.fix: Tension mat lo, MFi Certified cable means Apple se approved, jo tumhare phone ke liye sabse safe hai. Fast charging aur data sync bhi smooth chalega. ₹265 mein original quality ka bharosa mil raha hai. Ye sabse smart buy hai apne iPhone ke liye, no compromises! 👌
products.loot_reason: Ek genuine MFi certified lightning cable market mein ₹800-₹1200 ka bikta hai, ye ₹265 mein mil raha hai, seedha loot hai bhai!

products.name: KARWAN 100W 2in1 Type C to Type C Cable [2 Yrs Warranty] Dual Port USB-C PD Fast Charging Cable with E-Marker Chip
products.hook: Ye price glitch hai ya kya? 😱 100W PD Type-C cable with 2 saal warranty, sirf ₹269 mein?!
products.pain: Roz naya charger cable kharab ho jaata hai? Ya laptop charge karne mein ghanton lag jaate hain, aur phone ko alag se karna padta hai?
products.fix: Bhai, ye KARWAN ka cable har Type-C device ke liye ultimate solution hai. 100W Power Delivery matlab laptop, tablet, phone, sab rocket speed pe charge honge! Upar se 2 saal ki warranty aur E-Marker chip, jo expensive cables mein hoti hai, woh bhi sirf ₹269 mein! Yeh deal chodna paap hai! 🤯
products.loot_reason: Ek high-quality 100W PD cable with E-Marker chip aur 2 saal ki warranty usually ₹1000 se upar ka milta hai, abhi ₹269 mein mila hai!

products.name: One94Store Rechargeable Handheld Fan | 1800mAh Battery | 6 Speed Modes Touch Control | Hanging Neck Fan with Mobile Stand
products.hook: Garmi se hostel mein haalat kharab hai? Bhai, ye fan dekho! 🥵
products.pain: Lectures sunte sunte AC na hone se paseene-paseene ho jaate ho? Ya raat ko padhte hue garmi se neend nahin aati?
products.fix: Ye One94Store ka rechargeable fan tumhara saviour hai! 1800mAh battery, 6 speed modes aur toh aur, mobile stand bhi hai! Phone dekhte dekhte thandi hawa lo ya desk pe rakh ke padho. ₹399 mein aisa deal, miss kiya toh pachtaoge! Isse viral hostel hack kehte hain! 🔥
products.loot_reason: Normal fans ₹800-₹1000 ke hote hain, but ismein extra features ke saath ₹1499 waali cheez abhi ₹399 mein mil rahi hai!

products.name: Orient Electric 12W Rechargeable Emergency LED bulb| Inverter Bulb for home with 2 hours battery backup| Up to 4 kV surge protection| 6500K, Cool White, B22d base| Over charging Protection| Pack of 1
products.hook: OMG! Ye emergency bulb ₹229 mein? Power cut ka darr khatam! 😱
products.pain: Exam ke time light chali gayi aur saara mood kharab? Ya assignments karte-karte andhera ho gaya?
products.fix: Ab no tension! Ye Orient ka emergency bulb automatic charge hota hai aur 2 ghante tak backup deta hai. 12W ki roshni hai, matlab poora room illuminate ho jayega. Bhai, ye toh hostel ka naya 'secret weapon' hai!
products.loot_reason: Ek achha branded emergency bulb ₹800+ ka hota hai, abhi ₹229 mein mil raha hai, matlab seedha 70% se zyada off!

products.name: Add2Cart Pre-Seasoned Tadka Pan, Compatible with Gas | Toxin-Free, Chemical Coating-Free, 100% Pure (Black Stainless Steel, 400ML)
products.hook: Seriously, ye tadka pan hostel waalon ke liye must-have hai. Chhota packet, bada dhamaka!
products.pain: Raat ko hunger pangs uthte hain ya jaldi kuch banana hai, par sirf maggi hi option hai? Aur utensil dhone ka jhanjhat?
products.fix: Is chhote tadka pan se instant Anda bhurji, dal tadka, ya quick veggies bana le. Pre-seasoned hai, toxin-free, aur gas pe bhi chalega. Chhota hai, easy to store, aur ₹129 mein kya hi nuksan hai?
products.loot_reason: Ek decent pre-seasoned pan ₹500 se kam nahi aata, abhi ₹129 mein mil raha hai, bas le le!

products.name: Umadiya® Lunch Box 3 Compartment Out Side-Leak-Proof BPA Free Stainless Steel, Lunch Box for Kids, Lunch Box for School & Office with a Fork, a Spoon and a Pair of Chopsticks 750 ml(Blue)
products.hook: Bhai, ye lunchbox nahi, savings ka jackpot hai! 🥳 Hostel ka khana bore ho gaya? Ye dekh!
products.pain: Har roz mess ka theekha khana kha ke pet kharab hota hai? Ya canteen mein paise udake jeb khali?
products.fix: Tension mat le, ab ghar se, ya khud bana ke, apna garam khana le ja! Isme 3 compartments hain, leak-proof hai, aur spoon-fork bhi free mil rahe hain. Full stainless steel, BPA free, aur sirf ₹388 mein? Gandi deal hai boss!
products.loot_reason: Itni high quality stainless steel lunch box, accessories ke saath, usually ₹1300+ ka milta hai, abhi ₹388 mein loot lo!
